technique.name: single-step ASAp re-weighting for MaskGIT
technique.citation: Park et al., NeurIPS 2024, 'Grammar-Aligned Decoding', arXiv:2405.21047
technique.fidelity: Adapted (single-step approximation, not full expected-future ASAp)
technique.motivation: A1 emptiness probe (SLM-20, evals/emptiness_probe.py): hard constraint masking renormalizes over grammar-legal tokens and distorts the model distribution toward valid-but-empty completions

matrix_row.eid_choice_reason: main advanced through ~E263; concurrent open PRs claimed E259-E267; E268 chosen to avoid collision
matrix_row.reason_unrun: A5 recipe decodes LTR via compiler-tree (grammar_ltr_primary=True, compiler_decode_mode=tree); ASAp lives in the MaskGIT unmask loop, so under the exact matched recipe the ledger is dormant and E268 reproduces E240 byte-for-byte. Ledger liveness is proven on the MaskGIT decode path by tests instead.

mechanism.AsapLedger: records per-position grammar-removed probability mass (positions, sum, mean, max, nonzero)
mechanism.removed_mass: 1 - sum(model prob over grammar-legal ids); 1.0 fail-closed on empty legal set; clamped [0,1]
mechanism.asap_reweight: q(t) = p(t)^gamma / Z with gamma = clip(1 - alpha*M, 1e-3, 1); alpha=0 or M=0 reproduces plain renormalization; order-preserving (winning legal token unchanged, no illegal token admitted)
mechanism.asap_filter_commits: defers MaskGIT commits whose removed mass exceeds asap_defer_mass; always keeps the lowest-removed-mass candidate (progress guarantee); nothing deferred on the final step; frontier-only measurement (contiguous committed left prefix)
mechanism.single_step_approximation: corrects using removed mass observed at the current position instead of a full expected-future grammaticality estimate (which full ASAp refines across samples)

fixture_wiring_smoke.honesty: wiring-evidence-only; ledger-liveness proof; no quality claim supported
fixture_wiring_smoke.suite: single fixture record; MaskGIT decode path (grammar_ltr_primary=false, compiler_decode_mode=off)
fixture_wiring_smoke.interpretation: Ledger is LIVE on the MaskGIT path (8 frontier positions measured, all nonzero). mean removed mass = 1.0 is expected at random init: the untrained denoiser puts ~zero mass on grammar-legal continuations, so the constraint removes ~all mass. The partial-distortion regime (0<M<1) and any output change require a trained checkpoint. Deferral produced no net output change at this tiny budget.

meaningful_parse_primary.note: frontier quality verdict vs A5 baseline is unrun-at-scale; requires the frozen A5 checkpoint on a real suite AND a MaskGIT-decode configuration for ASAp to engage

tests.touched_suites_full: 439 passed, 4 skipped, 15 deselected (tests/test_dsl, tests/test_harnesses/model_build, tests/test_models, tests/test_scripts via .githooks/check-changed)

ship_gate: n/a (decode-lever wiring; no gate change, no gate weakened)
honesty_mode: honest wiring + measured ledger-liveness; frontier quality verdict labeled unrun-at-scale
